text.message: Black, can work together in this bottom left corner? I will trade some wood to help you settle the ore port if you leave my 3:1 open on the 10 brick.
Next 6, I will trade the wood for ore
black what do you get out of this deal lol?
A road player that didn't plow his ore, for starters
if you plowed you would get knighted a lot tho
I'm getting that anyways, with no ore
can i do on my turn?
o dont want to go over
unless you can trade im going to rob
The 4 is impactful for both me and red
it's also not impactful for oj
i just traded it to yoou
orange is just going to win easily man
i can just give you my hand at this point if yoou want
even if we all team up against orange it's lost here
I struggle to get to 10bwithout you guys feeding me ore
you have the best set up and a 3:1
But I appreciated the early city
and a vp or knight in land
black do you have any brick
will probably fail but oh well
you guys can fight devs and knight him
believe it or not but i dont have devs
i can feed you guys ores
if i get them i guess
we literally need to work together man
we cant let him get a city
This is a close game...don't feed red a win out of fear of me
no one is feeding a win
if 8 would come as often as 9
black or blue do you need ore or sheep
i have some for you guys
blue do you need a road to settle?
got to block the wheat black
i think oj has it here man dang
he needs to city to win
any of you guys need this?
blue i can give you brick
if we make it that far
